name: Europe GICS company data source references

properties.name: GICS official sector taxonomy and licensing
properties.coverage: Global taxonomy; company-level coverage depends on licensed vendor package
properties.gics_sectors_covered: Information Technology; Health Care; Financials; Consumer Discretionary; Communication Services; Industrials; Consumer Staples; Energy; Utilities; Materials; Real Estate
properties.notes: Use S&P DJI / MSCI GICS definitions and licensing before importing company-level sector classifications.

properties.name: GLEIF LEI company identity data
properties.coverage: Global legal entities with LEIs, including Europe
properties.gics_sectors_covered: Not provided directly; use for company identity, addresses, and identifier matching
properties.notes: Useful for legal entity names, addresses, and identifiers. It is not an authoritative GICS sector source.

properties.name: OpenFIGI identifier mapping
properties.coverage: Global securities identifiers, including European listed instruments
properties.access_model: Free API with limits; high-volume use may require an API key
properties.gics_sectors_covered: Not a complete GICS dataset; useful for joining securities identifiers to licensed sector data
properties.notes: Use only as an identifier reconciliation step, not as a complete company/GICS source.

properties.name: City Intelligence Cockpit Europe GICS import template
properties.coverage: Europe-ready template for user-provided or licensed company records
properties.gics_sectors_covered: Information Technology; Health Care; Financials; Consumer Discretionary; Communication Services; Industrials; Consumer Staples; Energy; Utilities; Materials; Real Estate
properties.notes: Use this schema for future company-level imports with latitude, longitude, GICS sector, provenance, and licensing metadata.
